item.description:
# Shruti 1.1.5
Follow Me actually follows you.
- Fixes Follow Me's app tracking: the background service could freeze on whichever app was frontmost when it started, so the hero never changed. Shruti now reads the live window order, which is always current. - Makes the quiet launch-time update check reliable; scheduled six-hour checks and manual checks are unchanged. - Includes everything from 1.1.4: the duck-path safety guard, stable live effect chains, hearing-safe trial expiry, and the interface polish pass.
